PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.descript: Adds a [gold]Safeword[/gold] into your hand at the beginning of combat. Damage triggers an electric discharge.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.flavor: You were not supposed to wear this by your own will.
PISHOCKTHESPIRE2-PISHOCK_COLLAR.title: PiShock Collar
